data.title: Dreame TV Shines at DREAME NEXT with Advanced Display and Audio Technologies
data.description: On April 28, 2026, INNIX, the premium home entertainment brand under Dreame Technology, unveiled its newest lineup of high-end televisions and home cinema products at a press event in San Francisco's Palace of Fine Arts. The event showcased a range of cutting-edge technology aimed at enhancing the viewing experience for consumers.

data.title: FPT and Shinhan Bank Deepen AI-Driven Cooperation Across Digital Finance, Startups, and Next-Gen Technologies
data.description: In Hanoi, Vietnam, a recent agreement was signed between FPT, a global technology corporation, and Shinhan Bank Co.,Ltd. from Korea. The memorandum of understanding (MoU) focuses on enhancing collaboration in digital finance, startup ecosystems, and strategic technologies, with AI playing a crucial role in unlocking fresh opportunities within innovation ecosystems in both Vietnam and South Korea. The exchange ceremony for the MOU was held during the Viet Nam-South Korea Business Forum in Hanoi, in the presence of the South Korean President. This agreement marks a significant step towards fostering partnership between the two entities.

data.description: Emphasis placed on helping all Australian citizens plan for their retirement and ensuring their long-term financial security. data.title: Federal judge denies former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried's request for new trial, calling it a move to improve his reputation.
data.description: A federal judge rejected Sam Bankman-Fried's plea for a new trial, criticizing it as a mere attempt to salvage his reputation. The judge denied the former FTX CEO's request, emphasizing the perceived motive behind it.
